goal: Planner handles revision_mode: in_place_update by persisting changes to the supplied active_plan_path, using review finding IDs instead of embedding the full prior plan body

input.query: Update the active plan for review findings PA-MAJOR-1 and AV-BLOCKING-2.
input.revision_reason: Resolve PLAN_REVIEW findings PA-MAJOR-1 and AV-BLOCKING-2.
input.revision_request: Apply the review findings to active_plan_path only. Reference PA-MAJOR-1 and AV-BLOCKING-2, keep prior plan context by path, and do not paste the prior plan body.

assertions: revision_mode: in_place_update requires active_plan_path, trace_id, iteration_index, and revision_reason before Planner may edit an active plan.
persisted_artifact means the same plan_path is saved before chat handoff; it does not require a new path.
Token economy: revision_request references active_plan_path and review_finding_ids, never an embedded prior plan body, and stays under 1500 characters.
